name: player_team_pass_yards_from_plays single-year no-split projects year+week onto base CTE (additive)
description: Regression companion to the rate variant: the additive force_player_active measure breaks identically in a single-year no-split view because the gamelogs join references base.year/base.week the off-only CTE never projected. Pins the (off, year, week) base-CTE grain for the additive path; the _player_team_stats CTE sums the measure to pid.
expected_query: with "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week"), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "player_gamelogs"."esbid" = "nfl_games"."esbid" inner join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" on "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team" and "nfl_games"."year" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."year" and "nfl_games"."week" = "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."week" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats" on "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('QB') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_player_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
